description: Golden test vectors for cross-language Capsule verification. Each fixture contains a capsule_dict, the expected canonical_json, and the expected sha3_256_hash. A conformant implementation must produce byte-identical canonical_json and matching hash for each fixture.

fixtures.name: minimal
fixtures.description: Minimal capsule with all defaults. Tests float serialization (confidence: 0.0) and null handling.

fixtures.name: full
fixtures.description: Fully populated capsule with all sections, nested options, tool calls, and metrics. Tests recursive key sorting, float formatting, and complex nested structures.

reasoning.reasoning: Blue-green provides zero-downtime with easy rollback capability

fixtures.name: fractional_timestamp
fixtures.description: Capsule with microsecond-precision timestamp. Tests datetime.isoformat() with fractional seconds.

fixtures.name: empty_vs_null
fixtures.description: Tests distinction between empty strings and null. source is empty string, correlation_id is null, user_id is null. Critical for languages that conflate empty/null.

fixtures.name: confidence_one
fixtures.description: Confidence exactly 1.0. Tests that float-typed fields serialize as 1.0, not 1. Critical for Go, Rust, and JavaScript which don't distinguish float from int.

fixtures.name: deep_nesting
fixtures.description: Deeply nested objects in environment and resources_used. Tests recursive key sorting.

fixtures.name: chain_genesis
fixtures.description: First capsule in a chain. sequence=0, previous_hash=null. Tests genesis chain state.

fixtures.name: chain_linked
fixtures.description: Second capsule in a chain. sequence=1, previous_hash set to a SHA3-256 hex digest. Tests chain linking with realistic hash value.

fixtures.name: failure_with_error
fixtures.description: Failed capsule with error details and failed tool call. Tests error path serialization.
